overall.description: A cinematic stationary shot of a medieval fantasy tavern interior rendered in a game engine, featuring warm candlelight, stone architecture, red tapestries, and NPC patrons walking and socializing. The scene showcases high-quality lighting and atmospheric details typical of Unreal Engine 5.

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a medieval fantasy tavern's great hall, illuminated by a grand central chandelier and candlelight. The stone architecture features red tapestries and an upper balcony level. Patrons walk through the space while others sit at wooden tables or near the fireplace on the right. The atmosphere is warm and bustling with moderate crowd activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary, immersive view of a bustling medieval fantasy tavern that maintains a warm, atmospheric glow throughout. It begins by capturing the grand scale of the great hall, where a central chandelier and flickering candlelight illuminate the stone architecture and rich red tapestries. As the eye wanders through the space, the scene reveals a lively social hub with patrons circulating between the upper balcony and the main floor. The focus then shifts toward the right side of the hall, where guests gather around wooden tables and a roaring fireplace. Finally, the view settles on the continuous movement of the crowd, emphasizing the cozy and vibrant energy of the tavern interior.
